revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 25 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 25 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月25日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[神護景雲]]3年（[[769年]]_月_日） - [[和気清麻呂]]が[[大隅国]]へ配流 * [[寛平]]5年（[[893年]]_月_日） - [[菅原道真]]が『新撰万葉集』を編纂 * [[文政]]12年（[[1829年]]_月_日） - 日本地図などの持ち出しを図った[[フィリップ・フランツ・フォン・シーボルト|シーボルト]]が国外追放・再渡来禁止に
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[承保]]2年（[[1075年]]_月_日） - [[藤原教通]]、[[関白]]（* [[996年]]） * [[嘉禄]]元年（[[1225年]]_月_日） - [[慈円]]、[[天台宗]]の僧侶（* [[1155年]]） * [[康元]]元年（[[1256年]][[10月14日]]） - [[藤原頼嗣]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]5代将軍（* [[1239年]]） * [[元禄]]4年（[[1691年]]_月_日） - [[土佐光起]]、画家（* [[1617年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月24日 (旧暦)|9月24日]] 翌日[[9月26日 (旧暦)|9月26日]] - 前月[[8月25日 (旧暦)|8月25日]] 翌月[[10月25日 (旧暦)|10月25日]] *新暦[[9月25日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月24日 (旧暦)|9月24日]] 翌日[[9月26日 (旧暦)|9月26日]] - 前月[[8月25日 (旧暦)|8月25日]] 翌月[[10月25日 (旧暦)|10月25日]] *新暦[[9月25日]]
{{stub}}

== できごと == * [[神護景雲]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[769年]][[10月28日]]） - [[和気清麻呂]]が[[大隅国]]へ配流{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[寛平]]5年（ユリウス暦[[893年]][[11月7日]]） - [[菅原道真]]が『[[新撰万葉集]]』を編纂 * [[文政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1829年]][[10月22日]]） - 日本地図などの持ち出しを図った[[フィリップ・フランツ・フォン・シーボルト|シーボルト]]が国外追放・再渡来禁止に * [[明治元年]]（グレゴリオ暦1868年11月6日） - 戊辰戦争最大の激戦となった北越戦争で長岡藩が官軍に降伏
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]14年（[[閏]]）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月16日]]） - [[田中光顕]]、[[内閣書記官長]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[承保]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1075年]][[11月6日]]） - [[藤原教通]]、[[関白]]（* [[996年]]） * [[嘉禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1225年]][[10月28日]]） - [[慈円]]、[[天台宗]]の[[僧侶]]（* [[1155年]]） * [[康元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1256年]][[10月14日]]） - [[藤原頼嗣]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]5代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1239年]]） * [[元禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1691年]][[11月14日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、[[画家]]（* [[1617年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[11月9日]]） - [[吉益東洞]]、[[漢方医学|漢方医]]（* [[1702年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月25日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]14年（[[閏]]）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月16日]]） - [[田中光顕]]、[[内閣書記官長]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[承保]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1075年]][[11月6日]]） - [[藤原教通]]、[[関白]]（* [[996年]]） * [[嘉禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1225年]][[10月28日]]） - [[慈円]]、[[天台宗]]の[[僧侶]]（* [[1155年]]） * [[康元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1256年]][[10月14日]]） - [[藤原頼嗣]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]5代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1239年]]） * [[元禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1691年]][[11月14日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、[[画家]]（* [[1617年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[11月9日]]） - [[吉益東洞]]、[[漢方医学|漢方医]]（* [[1702年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925}}

== できごと == * [[神護景雲]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[769年]][[10月28日]]） - [[和気清麻呂]]が[[大隅国]]へ配流{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[寛平]]5年（ユリウス暦[[893年]][[11月7日]]） - [[菅原道真]]が『[[新撰万葉集]]』を編纂 * [[文政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1829年]][[10月22日]]） - 日本地図などの持ち出しを図った[[フィリップ・フランツ・フォン・シーボルト|シーボルト]]が国外追放・再渡来禁止に * [[明治元年]]（グレゴリオ暦1868年11月6日） - 戊辰戦争最大の激戦となった北越戦争で長岡藩が官軍に降伏
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]14年（[[閏]]）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月16日]]） - [[田中光顕]]、[[内閣書記官長]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[承保]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1075年]][[11月6日]]） - [[藤原教通]]、[[関白]]（* [[996年]]） * [[嘉禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1225年]][[10月28日]]） - [[慈円]]、[[天台宗]]の[[僧侶]]（* [[1155年]]） * [[康元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1256年]][[10月14日]]） - [[藤原頼嗣]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]5代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1239年]]） * [[元禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1691年]][[11月14日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、[[画家]]（* [[1617年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[11月9日]]） - [[吉益東洞]]、[[漢方医学|漢方医]]（* [[1702年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925}}
[[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:9月25日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar September]]

revision.text:
{{Lunar September}} '''September 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 25'''<!--Lunar September25 is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events == * [[神護景雲]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[769年]][[10月28日]]） - [[和気清麻呂]]が[[大隅国]]へ配流{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[寛平]]5年（ユリウス暦[[893年]][[11月7日]]） - [[菅原道真]]が『[[新撰万葉集]]』を編纂 * [[文政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1829年]][[10月22日]]） - 日本地図などの持ち出しを図った[[フィリップ・フランツ・フォン・シーボルト|シーボルト]]が国外追放・再渡来禁止に * [[明治元年]]（グレゴリオ暦1868年11月6日） - 戊辰戦争最大の激戦となった北越戦争で長岡藩が官軍に降伏
== Births == * [[天保]]14年（[[閏]]）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月16日]]） - [[田中光顕]]、[[内閣書記官長]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== Deaths == * [[承保]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1075年]][[11月6日]]） - [[藤原教通]]、[[関白]]（* [[996年]]） * [[嘉禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1225年]][[10月28日]]） - [[慈円]]、[[天台宗]]の[[僧侶]]（* [[1155年]]） * [[康元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1256年]][[10月14日]]） - [[藤原頼嗣]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]5代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1239年]]） * [[元禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1691年]][[11月14日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、[[画家]]（* [[1617年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[11月9日]]） - [[吉益東洞]]、[[漢方医学|漢方医]]（* [[1702年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:9月25日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先負]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:September 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] [[Category:month category-September 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)-month category]]

{{Lunar September}} '''September 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 25'''<!--Lunar September25 is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events == * [[神護景雲]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[769年]][[10月28日]]） - [[和気清麻呂]]が[[大隅国]]へ配流{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[寛平]]5年（ユリウス暦[[893年]][[11月7日]]） - [[菅原道真]]が『[[新撰万葉集]]』を編纂 * [[文政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1829年]][[10月22日]]） - 日本地図などの持ち出しを図った[[フィリップ・フランツ・フォン・シーボルト|シーボルト]]が国外追放・再渡来禁止に * [[明治元年]]（グレゴリオ暦1868年11月6日） - 戊辰戦争最大の激戦となった北越戦争で長岡藩が官軍に降伏
== Births == * [[天保]]14年（[[閏]]）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月16日]]） - [[田中光顕]]、[[内閣書記官長]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== Deaths == * [[承保]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1075年]][[11月6日]]） - [[藤原教通]]、[[関白]]（* [[996年]]） * [[嘉禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1225年]][[10月28日]]） - [[慈円]]、[[天台宗]]の[[僧侶]]（* [[1155年]]） * [[康元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1256年]][[10月14日]]） - [[藤原頼嗣]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]5代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1239年]]） * [[元禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1691年]][[11月14日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、[[画家]]（* [[1617年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[11月9日]]） - [[吉益東洞]]、[[漢方医学|漢方医]]（* [[1702年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925}}

== Deaths == * [[承保]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1075年]][[11月6日]]） - [[藤原教通]]、[[関白]]（* [[996年]]） * [[嘉禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1225年]][[10月28日]]） - [[慈円]]、[[天台宗]]の[[僧侶]]（* [[1155年]]） * [[康元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1256年]][[10月14日]]） - [[藤原頼嗣]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]5代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1239年]]） * [[元禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1691年]][[11月14日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、[[画家]]（* [[1617年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[11月9日]]） - [[吉益東洞]]、[[漢方医学|漢方医]]（* [[1702年]]）

== Deaths == * [[承保]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1075年]][[11月6日]]） - [[藤原教通]]、[[関白]]（* [[996年]]） * [[嘉禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1225年]][[10月28日]]） - [[慈円]]、[[天台宗]]の[[僧侶]]（* [[1155年]]） * [[康元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1256年]][[10月14日]]） - [[藤原頼嗣]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]5代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1239年]]） * [[元禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1691年]][[11月14日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、[[画家]]（* [[1617年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[11月9日]]） - [[吉益東洞]]、[[漢方医学|漢方医]]（* [[1702年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925}}

--> == Events == * [[神護景雲]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[769年]][[10月28日]]） - [[和気清麻呂]]が[[大隅国]]へ配流{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[寛平]]5年（ユリウス暦[[893年]][[11月7日]]） - [[菅原道真]]が『[[新撰万葉集]]』を編纂 * [[文政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1829年]][[10月22日]]） - 日本地図などの持ち出しを図った[[フィリップ・フランツ・フォン・シーボルト|シーボルト]]が国外追放・再渡来禁止に * [[明治元年]]（グレゴリオ暦1868年11月6日） - 戊辰戦争最大の激戦となった北越戦争で長岡藩が官軍に降伏
== Births == * [[天保]]14年（[[閏]]）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月16日]]） - [[田中光顕]]、[[内閣書記官長]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== Deaths == * [[承保]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1075年]][[11月6日]]） - [[藤原教通]]、[[関白]]（* [[996年]]） * [[嘉禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1225年]][[10月28日]]） - [[慈円]]、[[天台宗]]の[[僧侶]]（* [[1155年]]） * [[康元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1256年]][[10月14日]]） - [[藤原頼嗣]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]5代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1239年]]） * [[元禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1691年]][[11月14日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、[[画家]]（* [[1617年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[11月9日]]） - [[吉益東洞]]、[[漢方医学|漢方医]]（* [[1702年]]）

[[sn:September 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 25일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿五]] [[zh:九月廿五]] [[en:draft:September 25 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長}}6年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|928|ja|928}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}}） – During the reign of the 【Yuan dynasty】, Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広}} (one of the four sons of {{ill|Taira Takamochi|ja|平高望}}, of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* {{ill|835|ja|835}}). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* {{ill|927|ja|927}}). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}}, a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}}, was recorded (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}}). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}}） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}}, the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}}） – Agrarian reformer {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} was born (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925}}

== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|928|ja|928}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}} ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広}} (one of the four sons of {{ill|Taira Takamochi|ja|平高望}} , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* {{ill|835|ja|835}} ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} , was recorded (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – Agrarian reformer {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} was born (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|928|ja|928}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}} ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広}} (one of the four sons of {{ill|Taira Takamochi|ja|平高望}} , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* {{ill|835|ja|835}} ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} , was recorded (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – Agrarian reformer {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} was born (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ). == See Also ==

== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|928|ja|928}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}} ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広}} (one of the four sons of {{ill|Taira Takamochi|ja|平高望}} , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* {{ill|835|ja|835}} ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} , was recorded (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – Agrarian reformer {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} was born (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 25 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 25일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月25日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 25일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿五]] [[zh:九月廿五]] [[en:draft:September 25 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|928|ja|928}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}} ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広}} (one of the four sons of {{ill|Taira Takamochi|ja|平高望}} , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* {{ill|835|ja|835}} ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} , was recorded (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – Agrarian reformer {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} was born (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|928|ja|928}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日}} ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広}} (one of the four sons of {{ill|Taira Takamochi|ja|平高望}} , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* {{ill|835|ja|835}} ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|976|ja|976}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤}} (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* {{ill|927|ja|927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家}} , was recorded (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日}} ） – Agrarian reformer {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} was born (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|928|ja|928|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広|12=draft|12=draft}} (one of the four sons of {{ill|Taira Takamochi|ja|平高望|12=draft|12=draft}} , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* {{ill|835|ja|835|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft|12=draft}} (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft|12=draft}} , was recorded (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Agrarian reformer {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft|12=draft}} was born (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長|12=draft|12=draft}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|928|ja|928|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 4|ja|12月4日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広|12=draft|12=draft}} (one of the four sons of {{ill|Taira Takamochi|ja|平高望|12=draft|12=draft}} , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* {{ill|835|ja|835|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|976|ja|976|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 14|ja|11月14日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Zhao Kuangyin|ja|趙匡胤|12=draft|12=draft}} (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* {{ill|927|ja|927|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1127|ja|1127|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 25|ja|11月25日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|ja|源義光|12=draft|12=draft}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|ja|源義家|12=draft|12=draft}} , was recorded (* {{ill|1045|ja|1045|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|ja|永享|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1433|ja|1433|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 1|ja|12月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Go-Komatsu|ja|後小松天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* {{ill|1377|ja|1377|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 17|ja|11月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） – Agrarian reformer {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳|12=draft|12=draft}} was born (* {{ill|1787|ja|1787|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月25日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の25日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[神護景雲]]3年（[[ユリウス暦]][[769年]][[10月28日]]） - [[和気清麻呂]]が[[大隅国]]へ配流{{要出典|date=2021-03}} * [[寛平]]5年（ユリウス暦[[893年]][[11月7日]]） - [[菅原道真]]が『[[新撰万葉集]]』を編纂 * [[文政]]12年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1829年]][[10月22日]]） - 日本地図などの持ち出しを図った[[フィリップ・フランツ・フォン・シーボルト|シーボルト]]が国外追放・再渡来禁止に * [[明治元年]]（グレゴリオ暦1868年11月6日） - 戊辰戦争最大の激戦となった北越戦争で長岡藩が官軍に降伏
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]14年（[[閏]]）（グレゴリオ暦[[1843年]][[11月16日]]） - [[田中光顕]]、[[内閣書記官長]]（+ [[1939年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[承保]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1075年]][[11月6日]]） - [[藤原教通]]、[[関白]]（* [[996年]]） * [[嘉禄]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1225年]][[10月28日]]） - [[慈円]]、[[天台宗]]の[[僧侶]]（* [[1155年]]） * [[康元]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1256年]][[10月14日]]） - [[藤原頼嗣]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]5代[[征夷大将軍|将軍]]（* [[1239年]]） * [[元禄]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1691年]][[11月14日]]） - [[土佐光起]]、[[画家]]（* [[1617年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[11月9日]]） - [[吉益東洞]]、[[漢方医学|漢方医]]（* [[1702年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 25일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月廿五]][[zh:九月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840119]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 25|qq=September 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .

== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entchō|qq=|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97379316}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:928|928]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]] ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty|qq=}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Yoshihiro|qq=|1=Taira no Yoshihiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483524}} (one of the four sons of [[:en:Taira no Takamochi|Taira Takamochi]] , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* [[:en:835|835]] ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tairoku|qq=|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|qq=|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] , was recorded (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – Agrarian reformer [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] was born (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿五]][[zh:九月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840119]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 25|qq=September 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entchō|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97379316}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:928|928]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]] ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty|qq=}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Yoshihiro|1=Taira no Yoshihiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483524}} (one of the four sons of [[:en:Taira no Takamochi|Taira Takamochi]] , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* [[:en:835|835]] ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tairoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] , was recorded (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – Agrarian reformer [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] was born (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿五]][[zh:九月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840119]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 25|qq=September 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entchō|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97379316}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:928|928]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]] ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty|qq=}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Yoshihiro|1=Taira no Yoshihiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483524}} (one of the four sons of [[:en:Taira no Takamochi|Taira Takamochi]] , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* [[:en:835|835]] ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tairoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] , was recorded (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – Agrarian reformer [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] was born (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|24|9|26|8|25|10|9|0925|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿五]][[zh:九月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840119]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 25|qq=September 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entchō|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97379316}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:928|928]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]] ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty|qq=}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Yoshihiro|1=Taira no Yoshihiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483524}} (one of the four sons of [[:en:Taira no Takamochi|Taira Takamochi]] , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* [[:en:835|835]] ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tairoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] , was recorded (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – Agrarian reformer [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] was born (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).
== See Also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿五]][[zh:九月廿五]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840119]] Wikidata name: 25th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 25|qq=September 25}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entchō|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97379316}} 6th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:928|928]] [[:en:December 4|December 4]] ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty|qq=}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Yoshihiro|1=Taira no Yoshihiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483524}} (one of the four sons of [[:en:Taira no Takamochi|Taira Takamochi]] , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* [[:en:835|835]] ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tairoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:976|976]] [[:en:November 14|November 14]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Taizu of Song|Zhao Kuangyin]] (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* [[:en:927|927]] ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1127|1127]] [[:en:November 25|November 25]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu]] , a military commander and younger brother of [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshiie|Minamoto no Yoshiie]] , was recorded (* [[:en:1045|1045]] ). * [[:en:Eikyō|Eikyō]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1433|1433]] [[:en:December 1|December 1]] ） – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Go-Komatsu|Go-Komatsu]] , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* [[:en:1377|1377]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:November 17|November 17]] ） – Agrarian reformer [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] was born (* [[:en:1787|1787]] ).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .

Takamochi|en|Taira no Takamochi|WD=Q11483791|lt=Taira Takamochi}} , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* {{ill|835|en|835|WD=Q23894|lt=835}} ). * (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* {{ill|927|en|927|WD=Q30470|lt=927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Daiji (Japan)|comment=changed title Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|WD=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie}} , was recorded (* {{ill|1045|en|1045|WD=Q19351|lt=1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|WD=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian {{Not to be confused with|September 25|qq=September 25}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Entchō|ja|延長|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entchō|1=Enchō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q97379316}} 6th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|928|en|928|WD=Q24297|lt=928|1=928}} {{ill|December 4|en|December 4|WD=Q2310|lt=December 4|1=December 4}} ） – During the reign of the {{Yuan dynasty|qq=}} , Prince {{ill|Taira Yoshihiro|ja|平良広|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira Yoshihiro|1=Taira no Yoshihiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483524}} (one of the four sons of {{ill|Taira no Takamochi|en|Taira no Takamochi|WD=Q11483791|lt=Taira Takamochi|1=Taira no Takamochi}} , of the Kanmu Taira clan) was driven to death by strangulation (* {{ill|835|en|835|WD=Q23894|lt=835|1=835}} ). * {{ill|Tairoku|ja|太平興国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tairoku|1=Taipingxinguo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10941278}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|976|en|976|WD=Q23782|lt=976|1=976}} {{ill|November 14|en|November 14|WD=Q2983|lt=November 14|1=November 14}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Taizu of Song|en|Emperor Taizu of Song|WD=Q7471|lt=Zhao Kuangyin|1=Emperor Taizu of Song}} (Taizu) of the Northern Song ascended the throne (* {{ill|927|en|927|WD=Q30470|lt=927|1=927}} ). * {{ill|Daiji (Japan)|ja|大治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daiji (Japan)|1=Q10936305|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10936305}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1127|en|1127|WD=Q23827|lt=1127|1=1127}} {{ill|November 25|en|November 25|WD=Q3020|lt=November 25|1=November 25}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|en|Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|WD=Q3083118|lt=Minamoto no Yoshimitsu|1=Minamoto no Yoshimitsu}} , a military commander and younger brother of {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshiie|en|Minamoto no Yoshiie|WD=Q32613|lt=Minamoto no Yoshiie|1=Minamoto no Yoshiie}} , was recorded (* {{ill|1045|en|1045|WD=Q19351|lt=1045|1=1045}} ). * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|WD=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō|1=Eikyō}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1433|en|1433|WD=Q6356|lt=1433|1=1433}} {{ill|December 1|en|December 1|WD=Q2297|lt=December 1|1=December 1}} ） – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Komatsu|en|Emperor Go-Komatsu|WD=Q123052|lt=Go-Komatsu|1=Emperor Go-Komatsu}} , the 100th emperor of the Northern Court, reigned (* {{ill|1377|en|1377|WD=Q6289|lt=1377|1=1377}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|WD=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|November 17|en|November 17|WD=Q3028|lt=November 17|1=November 17}} ） – Agrarian reformer {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|en|Ninomiya Sontoku|WD=Q968964|lt=Ninomiya Sontoku|1=Ninomiya Sontoku}} was born (* {{ill|1787|en|1787|WD=Q7763|lt=1787|1=1787}} ).
